modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Fillable PDF fields appear blank in Adobe Acrobat Pro.

full_description_text: I received a fillable PDF form, but when I open it in Adobe Acrobat Pro, all the fields are blank. It's really frustrating because I need to fill it out. I also tried opening it in other programs like Adobe Reader and macOS Preview, but the issue persists.
short_description: Fillable PDF fields appear blank in Adobe Acrobat Pro.
description: I received a fillable PDF form, but when I open it in Adobe Acrobat Pro, all the fields are blank. It's really frustrating because I need to fill it out. I also tried opening it in other programs like Adobe Reader and macOS Preview, but the issue persists.
